---
name: "website-revamp-liquid-glass"
description: "Use when redesigning the root static marketing site, removing legacy 3D sections, and building an image-first liquid-glass UI from local /images assets."
applyTo:
  - "index.html"
  - "style.css"
  - "js/main.js"
---

# Root Website Revamp Instruction

## Intent
- Replace legacy 3D storytelling with a premium 2D editorial presentation.
- Keep the site fast, responsive, and easy to maintain.

## Structure Blueprint
1. Hero with logo, clear value proposition, and two strong CTAs.
2. Capability cards with image tiles and short measurable statements.
3. Project/industry gallery using existing `/images` assets.
4. Process or timeline strip to show delivery maturity.
5. Contact/footer with concise next step.

## Visual Blueprint
- Base palette: deep navy + cool cyan + warm highlight accents.
- Surfaces: layered translucent cards with soft inner and outer shadows.
- Motion: staggered reveals and restrained hover elevation.
- Keep visual rhythm with alternating dense and open sections.

## Content Blueprint
- Prefer short paragraphs, specific headings, and bullet clarity.
- Avoid placeholder language and avoid generic "AI-generated" wording.
- Keep copy oriented to outcomes: reliability, compliance, speed, and visibility.

## Acceptance Checklist
- No 3D-specific copy remains.
- Images are used intentionally with relevant section framing.
- Desktop and mobile layouts both feel polished.
- JavaScript only enhances behavior; it does not carry the content.
